response.justification: Aisha is a strong generalist engineer with nearly two decades of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js skills, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and her AI-specific experience spans roughly one year. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on cloud platforms, and no clear evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery at staff level, making her a weak fit for this specific GenAI forward-deployed position despite excellent engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Deep full-stack engineering experience (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, high-throughput systems)
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record via workshops, courses, and talks
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI experience vs. the required 8+ years
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
No evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and recent MCP/agentic exposure
